A.evidence: Very faithful prose and headings with correct Table 1 and main equations; minor nits include duplicated image filename for Figures 1/2 and truncated ending.

B.evidence: Good prose, equations, and Table 1; misses the top permission/arXiv details and Figure 1 caption/image, with flatter heading hierarchy.

C.evidence: Prose mostly present but author order/details and hyphenation are damaged; several equations are replaced by formula-not-decoded, while Table 1 is usable but math is spaced/plain.

D.evidence: Mostly complete prose but OCR/math markup is noisy like h_{t}_{-}_{1} and 1 sqrt subscripts; Table 1 structure is present with degraded math.

E.evidence: Large repeated garbled author/email block before readable body; Table 1 is plain line text rather than structured rows/columns, though some equations are recognizable.

F.evidence: High-fidelity prose, math, and Table 1, but raw bbox JSON is inserted into the reading flow and disrupts page/section structure.

G.evidence: Severe hallucination and repetition with LOC tokens and altered prose; no usable tables in the provided start and structure is largely broken.

H.evidence: Good prose and Table 1, but inline math is often flattened or garbled such as ht−sup1, dmodel, and projection matrices rendered as broken superscripts.
